---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest a new feature for ARN-Skin
title: 'Feature: <short description>'
labels: enhancement
assignees: jzbakh
---

## Use case

Describe the problem you are trying to solve. What do you want to do that
the extension does not currently support?

## Proposed solution

Describe what you think should happen. Be specific about the behaviour
and, if relevant, the UI surface.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you have thought about and why you do not prefer them.

## Additional context

Screenshots, mockups, references to similar features in other extensions
— anything that helps explain.

## Pre-flight

- [ ] I have searched the existing issues and this is not a duplicate.
- [ ] The proposed feature stays within the project's scope (theming and
      live customisation of VSCode-family editors).
